description: The 'narrator draws on the frame' device: a red hand-drawn X, arrow, circle or prohibition mark appears over a held illustration to point at / cross out / emphasize something.
whenToUse: Pointing at a detail, crossing something out, a prohibition, an emphasis arrow (e.g. a red arrow at 'Left Hand', a red X over a wrong option).
generalize: The base scene, the markup marks (X/arrow/circle), their positions, and any short red word are SLOTS.
produces: reuse or gpt-image-2 the base scene as bgUrl; each markup mark = a gpt-image-2 red hand-drawn element (arrow/X/circle) via rembg -> overlay hard-appearing on the spoken word; optional red word via color-key.

scene.note: the base illustration being annotated (reuse prior beat's if continuing)

styleLock: Markup marks are gpt-image-2 red hand-drawn elements (semantic red); any word is gpt-image-2 lettering. Red is semantic-only.
rules: Marks hard-appear on the spoken word.
Reuse the base scene if the annotation continues a prior beat.
